case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. BRYAN RANDAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-26-2019 - ALAN SHERWOOD, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ON THIS MATTER. THIS MATTER WAS CONTINUED FROM TRIAL CALL OF 07/22/19 TO BE ASSIGNED OUT FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING TO DEPT. 514. PLAINTIFF ORALLY REQUESTED TO CONTINUE THIS TRIAL CALL, 08/26/19, AS THE CCP 98 DECLARATION LACKED A PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT GRANTED THE REQUEST AND CONTINUED THE MATTER TO SEP-23-2019 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PLAINTIFF TO PERFECT CCP 98 DECLARATION WITH PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE. ON 09/23/19, THIS MATTER WILL BE ASSIGNED OUT TO DEPT. 514 FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-22-2019 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON AUG-26-2019 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. ROGER JACKSON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE MATTER WAS CALLED AT 9:40AM AND RE-CALLED AT 10:05AM, BUT THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CASE WAS SENT TO DEPT. 514 FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING BUT IT WAS SENT BACK TO DEPT. 206 FOR LACK OF WITNESS. THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO 8/26/19 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 TO BE ASSIGNED OUT FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING TO DEPT. 514. PLAINTIFF WILL PRESENT EX PARTE APPLICATION TO DEPT. 514 REGARDING CCP 98. JUDGE: ANDREW CHENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
